title: Surgeon Vacancy at LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India:
LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India!
